title: coryphopteris nipponica
intro: Coryphopteris nipponica, also known as Japanese fern or Nippon fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coryphopteris nipponica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Coryphopteris nipponica is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal use, and it can also be used in traditional herbal remedies.
